title: Marketing Manager:in (m/w/d)
required_skills: Social media management (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube)
German language (fluent — full working proficiency required)
missing_skills: Social media channel management and content creation
German fluency (role requires native/near-native level; Boru is B2)
core_responsibilities: Independently manage all social media channels (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube) including content planning, creation, and community management
Run app communication: email campaigns, push notifications, and feature announcements
Develop content plan and send newsletters via Mailchimp to target audience
Build and maintain the Physician Assistant community
Set up and manage B2B Google Ads campaigns targeting clinics, practices, and MVZs

company_info.size_raw: Small team (described as 'Small team, high ownership' in JD)
